description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a prominent, dark-tinted cockpit canopy at the front. The wings are mid-mounted and feature angular, swept-back tips with blue and gray color accents, and small green elements at the wingtips and tail. The airplane has dual engine pods mounted under each wing, and a central underbelly pod or fuel tank. The tail section is equipped with a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both with angular, modern styling. The landing gear is not visibly extended, suggesting a possible retractable configuration. The overall design is reminiscent of a small, agile fighter jet or advanced trainer aircraft, with a robust and detailed exterior.
description: A compact, modern airplane with a dark cockpit, swept mid-mounted wings, and angular tail surfaces, featuring blue, gray, and green accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated nose, dark cockpit canopy, underwing engine pods, and swept-back wings with blue and green highlights.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin horizontal stabilizers, vertical tail fin, and the symmetry of the wing and engine arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the underbelly pod and angular tail design.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, wide cockpit canopy, and the full span of the swept wings with blue and green tips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept-back wings and angular tips; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and twin horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visibly extended).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy.
